intentSynonyms: look up a store in walmart
fetch a single store in walmart
view one specific store in walmart
get store details by store number in walmart
description: Get detailed information about a specific Walmart store by its store number. Returns address, phone, hours, and services. The store_id can include a slug suffix (e.g., "5435-san-jose-ca") or just the numeric ID (e.g., "5435").

store_id.description: Walmart store ID or slug (e.g., "5435" or "5435-san-jose-ca")
